mapper.select: SELECT id, sku_id, location_id, available, reserved, version FROM inventory WHERE sku_id = #{skuId} AND location_id = #{locationId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (id, sku_id, location_id, available, reserved, version) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.skuId}, #{row.locationId}, #{row.available}, #{row.reserved}, #{row.version})
